$schema: What's New entries — newest first. version is a free-form semver-ish string used for localStorage tracking of last-seen.

entries.title: Customer portal overhaul — Section 1–7
highlights: Send a real test email from Settings → Notifications and review the last 20 sends.
Filter your communications log by channel, delivery state, and event type.
Operational events (order placed, shipped, booking confirmed and paid) are now idempotent — duplicate webhooks no longer email you twice.
Every action taken on your account by an agency admin while impersonating you is recorded in a tamper-evident ledger.
Manage scripted chat flows that run when Chiko AI is unavailable — set triggers, priority, and steps.
Onboarding checklist on your portal home guides you through the first-run setup.
